problem.title: CT-LIO multi_scale_correspondences on HDL-400 (120 frames)
problem.question: Does the CT-ICP ms_chol multi_scale fallback (3x3x3 -> 5x5x5 when neighbors < knn) help CT-LIO too?

variants.label: Seed-only fast (current best, no multi-scale)
variants.intent: Existing CT-LIO best on HDL-400 (ATE 0.488 m).

variants.label: Seed-only fast + multi_scale
variants.intent: Test if 5x5x5 fallback helps when 3x3x3 is short on neighbors.

variants.label: CT-LIO default + multi_scale
variants.intent: Test if multi_scale also helps the IMU preintegration default.
